themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "And the king of Syria said, Go to, go, and I will send a letter unto the king of Israel. And...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
